extension.summary: FENtastic skin (Estuary MOD) — community fork by fentastic-org
FENtastic skin (Estuary MOD) — community fork by fentastic-org
FENtastic skin (Estuary MOD) — community fork by fentastic-org
extension.description: FENtastic is a community-maintained fork of Ivar Brandt's FENtastic skin, based on the default Estuary skin for Kodi. Features include custom viewtypes, customizable widgets, advanced HDR/video processing overlays, and more.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastic is a community-maintained fork of Ivar Brandt's FENtastic skin, based on the default Estuary skin for Kodi. Features include custom viewtypes, customizable widgets, advanced HDR/video processing overlays, and more.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastic is a community-maintained fork of Ivar Brandt's FENtastic skin, based on the default Estuary skin for Kodi. Features include custom viewtypes, customizable widgets, advanced HDR/video processing overlays, and more.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.
